feed.title: enterpriseai.tools weekly updates
feed.subtitle: High-impact market intelligence for enterprise AI tooling, with an expandable release log for lower-signal product changes.

entry.title: OpenAI Agents SDK — release
entry.summary: OpenAI Agents SDK 0.18.2 added GPT-5.6 request controls and hosted multi-agent beta support, plus sandbox and usage fixes.

entry.title: Microsoft Agent Framework — release
entry.summary: Microsoft Agent Framework Python 1.11.0 added message injection middleware for enqueuing messages into active runs.

entry.title: LangGraph — release
entry.summary: LangGraph 1.2.9 fixed updateState metadata and counters for delta channels.

entry.title: LangGraph — release
entry.summary: LangGraph CLI 0.4.31 allowed langgraph-api versions up to 1.0.0 and updated CLI dependencies.

entry.title: n8n — release
entry.summary: n8n released 2.29.10 with an editor bug fix to keep AI Assistant thread state intact during editor hand-off.

entry.title: OpenAI Agents SDK — release
entry.summary: OpenAI Agents SDK 0.18.1 added GPT-5.6 model defaults and migrated examples, with cache-write usage fixes.

entry.title: Atomic Agents — release
entry.summary: Atomic Agents 2.9.0 added pluggable chat history via BaseChatHistory for custom or persistent memory backends.

entry.title: n8n — release
entry.summary: n8n 2.29.9 shipped as a maintenance release following the 2.29 line, with release metadata published on GitHub.

entry.title: CrewAI — release
entry.summary: CrewAI 1.15.2 added dynamic LLM model loading in the crew wizard, inline skill definitions, and generated Flow Definition auth updates.

entry.title: Mastra — release
entry.summary: Mastra 1.50.0 added a LiveKit package for realtime voice agents and workflow-backed voice turns.

entry.title: Haystack — release
entry.summary: Haystack 2.31.0 began moving components out of core into dedicated packages ahead of 3.0.

entry.title: Semantic Kernel — release
entry.summary: Semantic Kernel Python 1.44.0 updated dependency versions, including tornado and pyjwt bumps.

entry.title: Semantic Kernel — release
entry.summary: Semantic Kernel .NET 1.78.0 updated package versions and included runtime and connector fixes.

entry.title: Mastra — release
entry.summary: Mastra 1.49.0 added opt-in storage retention policies and storage.prune() across core and supported storage backends.

entry.title: OpenAI Agents SDK — release
entry.summary: OpenAI Agents SDK 0.18.0 changed the default RealtimeAgent model to gpt-realtime-2.1.

entry.title: Paperclip — release
entry.summary: Paperclip v2026.707.0 added user-specific runtime secrets and other workflow/runtime updates across 89 commits.

entry.title: LangFlow — release
entry.summary: LangFlow 1.10.2 added global variable model overrides and other workflow/runtime improvements.

entry.title: LangGraph — release
entry.summary: LangGraph 1.2.8 fixed updateState behavior for delta channels on fresh threads.

entry.title: OpenAI Agents SDK — release
entry.summary: OpenAI Agents SDK 0.17.8 added invalid final-output recovery handling and fixed realtime session cancellation propagation.

entry.title: Microsoft Agent Framework — release
entry.summary: Microsoft Agent Framework .NET 1.13.0 added Foundry Hosting per-user session isolation, skill approval options, public skill-source APIs, configurable default-approval harness behavior, and new file-editing tools.

entry.title: NeMo Guardrails — release
entry.summary: NeMo Guardrails 0.23.0 expanded IORails with streaming and non-streaming tool-call validation, added a standalone /v1/checks validation endpoint, and improved OpenTelemetry observability for production guardrail pipelines.

entry.title: Mastra — release
entry.summary: Mastra 1.48.0 added cron-scheduled agent heartbeats, file-based agent and subagent auto-registration, durable suspended-run recovery, and stronger auth-context propagation across durable and Inngest execution paths.

entry.title: Mastra — release
entry.summary: Mastra 1.47.0 added AI SDK v7 model support, DurableAgent API parity for stream/resume/generate, gateway-first model discovery, AgentController routing, and eval quality gates.

entry.title: Microsoft Agent Framework — release
entry.summary: Microsoft Agent Framework Python 1.10.0 added Foundry conversation-session helpers and adaptive eval support, standalone Durable Task worker hosting, and stricter approval defaults for experimental file-access tools.

entry.title: LangGraph — release
entry.summary: LangGraph 1.2.7 fixed DeltaChannel overwrite snapshotting, preserved Overwrite values through JSON round trips, emitted valid exit-mode delta task IDs, and refreshed Redis, LangSmith, cryptography, Tornado, and PyJWT dependencies.

entry.title: CrewAI — release
entry.summary: CrewAI 1.15.1 required explicit CrewAI project definitions, initialized Git repositories for generated projects, improved CLI deploy handoff, and fixed an SSRF redirect bypass in scraping fetches.

entry.title: Paperclip — release
entry.summary: Paperclip v2026.626.0 made Hermes a built-in local and remote gateway adapter, added task watchdogs for long-running agent work, and surfaced sandbox runtime status directly in issue threads.

entry.title: Dify — release
entry.summary: Dify 1.15.0 introduced difyctl for terminal, script, and CI workflow runs, added richer human-in-the-loop workflow forms, and fixed CVE-2026-41948 in plugin-daemon forwarding.

entry.title: CrewAI — release
entry.summary: CrewAI 1.15.0 added declarative flow loading and CLI support for conversational flows, while also fixing credential-file permission enforcement and a skill-archive path-traversal issue.

entry.title: Flowise — release
entry.summary: Flowise 3.1.3 added chatflow-as-MCP-server and custom MCP server support, expanded Agentflow client filtering and knowledge fields, added initial observe package scaffolding, and fixed clickjacking plus frame-header handling.

entry.title: OpenAI Agents SDK — release
entry.summary: OpenAI Agents SDK 0.17.7 exposed configurable WebSocket size limits, added buffered Chat Completions tool-call streaming, made AdvancedSQLiteSession add_items atomic, and tightened sandbox, guardrail, and Realtime multi-agent edge cases.

entry.title: LlamaIndex — release
entry.summary: LlamaIndex 0.14.23 advanced multimodal synthesis, preserved URL-backed video and document memory blocks, added document/video block parsing for FunctionTool output, and fixed workflow state mutation leaks.

entry.title: Mastra — release
entry.summary: Mastra 1.46.0 reworked Harness around isolated sessions with remote HTTP and JS-client control, enabling safer concurrent multi-user agent hosting and deterministic tool-mocked experiments.

entry.title: LangFlow — release
entry.summary: LangFlow 1.10.1 added first-class local-model support for the assistant, created stable bundle release plumbing, fixed agent tool-calling model handling, revalidated redirects in the URL component to reduce SSRF risk, and limited private flow stream exposure.

entry.title: OpenAI Agents SDK — release
entry.summary: OpenAI Agents SDK 0.17.6 added pre-approval tool-input guardrails and SDK-only custom tool-output metadata, tightening human approval control points around agent tool execution.

entry.title: Haystack — release
entry.summary: Haystack 2.30.2 fixed Agent exit behavior so invalid or discarded tool calls no longer cause premature termination under the default text exit condition, allowing the agent loop to recover on the next iteration.

entry.title: Paperclip — release
entry.summary: Paperclip v2026.618.0 added a Skills Store, self-hostable Kubernetes sandbox execution, per-company tenant isolation, workspace artifact viewing, and opt-in OpenTelemetry instrumentation.

entry.title: Microsoft Agent Framework — release
entry.summary: Microsoft Agent Framework Python 1.9.0 added tool-approval middleware, integrated approvals into Harness agents, denied MCP server-initiated sampling by default, and promoted orchestrations to stable.

entry.title: Semantic Kernel — release
entry.summary: Semantic Kernel Python 1.43.1 added function_choice_behavior support to Azure AI and OpenAI Assistant agents, fixed MessagePack handling, and rejected encoded dot-segment paths in OpenAPI plugins.

entry.title: Amazon Bedrock — market-event
entry.summary: AWS announced Claude Fable 5 on Amazon Bedrock, then updated the notice to say Anthropic asked AWS to revoke access to Claude Fable 5 and Claude Mythos 5 under a US export-control directive.

source.title: AWS announces Claude Fable 5, the first generally available Mythos-class model

entry.title: Mastra — release
entry.summary: Mastra 1.42.0 added trusted system-actor execution for background workflows, tool suspension primitives across agents, thread-state durability, and new observability/storage options for production agent operations.

entry.title: CrewAI — release
entry.summary: CrewAI 1.14.7 added pluggable backends for memory, knowledge, RAG, and flow, plus a chat API, Snowflake Cortex provider support, and dependency CVE fixes.

entry.title: Microsoft Agent Framework — release
entry.summary: Microsoft Agent Framework Python 1.8.1 added MCP long-running task support and OpenTelemetry spans aligned to GenAI semantic conventions, while tightening MCP tool-argument filtering.

entry.title: LangFlow — release
entry.summary: LangFlow 1.10.0 added memory base APIs and UI components, sandboxed file-system support for agents, and native structured output on its Agent component.

entry.title: Amazon Bedrock Agents — feature
entry.summary: AWS added interactive PTY-backed shells to Bedrock AgentCore Runtime, letting teams reconnect into live agent sessions for debugging, file inspection, and terminal-native coding-agent workflows.

source.title: Amazon Bedrock AgentCore Runtime introduces interactive shells for terminal access into agent sessions

entry.title: Microsoft Foundry — feature
entry.summary: Microsoft announced Foundry Managed Compute, adding a managed GPU platform for hosting open-source and custom models through the same Foundry endpoint, SDKs, and billing surface used for frontier-model deployments.

source.title: Announcing Foundry Managed Compute: Run open models in Microsoft Foundry

entry.title: Microsoft Agent Framework — release
entry.summary: Microsoft Agent Framework 1.7.0 added harness agents, A2A session support, and new Foundry integration hooks, extending the framework's orchestration and inter-agent workflow surface.

entry.title: Amazon Bedrock — model-addition
entry.summary: AWS added Anthropic Claude Opus 4.8 to Amazon Bedrock, giving Bedrock customers access to Anthropic's latest high-end model inside AWS-managed security and regional controls.

source.title: Claude Opus 4.8 is now available on AWS

entry.title: Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform — deprecation
entry.summary: Google deprecated Vertex AI Extensions and said the service will shut down after 2026-11-26, directing teams to migrate agent integrations to Agent Platform to avoid disruption.

entry.title: Amazon Bedrock Agents — feature
entry.summary: AWS introduced AgentCore payments in preview, adding managed agent micropayments for APIs, web content, MCP servers, and other agents via x402-backed transaction flows.

source.title: Agents that transact: Introducing Amazon Bedrock AgentCore payments, built with Coinbase and Stripe

entry.title: Microsoft Agent Framework — release
entry.summary: Microsoft Agent Framework 1.4.0 introduced experimental skills API breaking changes, migrated its A2A layer to a2a-sdk v1.0, and tightened default DevUI access controls and CORS posture.

entry.title: LangFlow — release
entry.summary: LangFlow 1.9.3 shipped as a critical security release with SSRF protection, DNS rebinding prevention, dependency CVE fixes, and an explicit immediate-upgrade recommendation.

entry.title: Google Vertex AI — model-addition
entry.summary: Google announced Gemini 3.1 Flash-Lite general availability on Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform, adding a lower-latency, lower-cost production model option for agent and orchestration workloads.

source.title: Gemini 3.1 Flash-Lite is now generally available

entry.title: Dify — release
entry.summary: Dify 1.14.1 hardened self-hosted SECRET_KEY handling, protected internal metrics endpoints, fixed tenant-isolation issues, and refreshed dependencies for CVE-2026-42208 and related risks.

source.title: Security hardening, workflow stability, and cleaner self-hosted deployments · langgenius/dify · GitHub

entry.title: LangGraph — release
entry.summary: LangGraph 1.2.0 promoted its alpha packages to official releases and added durable error-handler resume across host crashes, improving reliability for stateful production agent workflows.

entry.title: Microsoft Foundry — feature
entry.summary: Foundry Local 1.1 added live transcription, embeddings, and Responses API support, expanding Microsoft’s local/no-cloud deployment path for speech, RAG, and tool-calling workloads.

source.title: Foundry Local 1.1: Live Transcription, Embeddings, and Responses API

entry.title: Microsoft Agent Framework — release
entry.summary: Microsoft Agent Framework Python 1.3.0 added class-based skill definitions plus experimental session-mode and todo-list harness context providers, expanding structured agent composition patterns.

entry.title: OpenAI Agents SDK — release
entry.summary: OpenAI Agents SDK 0.16.0 changed the default model to gpt-5.4-mini for runs without an explicit model, altering baseline behavior, reasoning defaults, and potential cost/perf expectations.

entry.title: Mastra — release
entry.summary: Mastra 1.32.0 introduced fine-grained authorization checks across agent runs, tool and workflow execution, memory thread access, server adapters, and MCP paths.

entry.title: Google Agent Builder + ADK — feature
entry.summary: Google made 50+ fully managed MCP servers available for Google Cloud services, expanding protocol-aligned tool integration options for Vertex AI and Gemini Enterprise agent builds.

source.title: 50+ fully managed MCP servers now available for Google Cloud services

entry.title: AWS Bedrock Agents — feature
entry.summary: AWS announced Amazon Bedrock AgentCore availability in the South America (São Paulo) Region, extending managed agent runtime coverage into an additional geography.

source.title: Amazon Bedrock AgentCore is now available in the South America (São Paulo) Region

entry.title: LangFlow — release
entry.summary: LangFlow 1.9.2 added telemetry to deployment APIs and shipped fixes across env var resolution, Google embeddings dimensions, and related deployment/runtime paths.

entry.title: OpenAI Agents SDK — release
entry.summary: OpenAI Agents SDK 0.15.0 changed refusal handling to raise ModelRefusalError explicitly instead of surfacing empty outputs, a behavior change that can affect run-loop integrations.

entry.title: CrewAI — release
entry.summary: CrewAI 1.14.4 added Azure OpenAI Responses API support, Azure AI Inference credential-scope forwarding, Vertex AI workload identity guidance, and new research/search tools integrations.

entry.title: Dify — release
entry.summary: Dify 1.14.0 introduced collaborative workflow editing with synced graph updates and presence indicators, while keeping collaboration disabled by default for self-hosted deployments.

entry.title: Microsoft Agent Framework — release
entry.summary: Microsoft Agent Framework Python 1.2.2 added an Azure AI Content Understanding context provider for documents, images, audio, and video, expanding enterprise attachment analysis paths.

entry.title: Paperclip — release
entry.summary: Paperclip v2026.428.0 added pause/resume controls for agents in the sidebar and improved handling for long issue threads, extending day-2 control-plane usability.

entry.title: Semantic Kernel — release
entry.summary: Semantic Kernel Python 1.41.3 added SQL Server field and table name escaping and extended in-memory collection filter blocklists, tightening connector safety for production use.

entry.title: LangFlow — release
entry.summary: LangFlow 1.9.1 shipped security fixes for MCP path traversal, cross-user disclosure, upload auth, IDOR, XSS handling, and webhook auth defaults, alongside Gemini 3 tool-calling updates.

entry.title: CrewAI — release
entry.summary: CrewAI 1.14.3 added Bedrock V4 support, checkpoint and fork support for standalone agents, Azure DefaultAzureCredential fallback, and security dependency patches.

entry.title: Microsoft Agent Framework — release
entry.summary: Microsoft Agent Framework Python 1.2.0 added a functional workflow API, OpenTelemetry support for GitHubCopilotAgent, and an A2A bridge, extending interoperability and observability for production agent deployments.

entry.title: Microsoft Foundry Agent Service — feature
entry.summary: Microsoft announced hosted agents preview, Toolbox preview, memory preview, and Foundry Toolkit for VS Code GA as part of the developer path from local builds to production deployment.

source.title: From Local to Production: The Complete Developer Journey for Building, Composing, and Deploying AI Agents

entry.title: Google Agent Builder + ADK — rename
entry.summary: Google launched Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform, folding Vertex AI and Agent Builder capabilities under a renamed platform with Agent Runtime, Agent Registry, Agent Identity, and related governance surfaces.

source.title: Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform release notes

entry.title: Haystack — release
entry.summary: Haystack 2.28.0 introduced breaking API changes around request exception handling, LLM initialization, and agent invocation signatures, with new runtime State injection for tools.

entry.title: Flowise release tightens security around CORS and MCP config
entry.summary: Flowise's April 14 release focused on security hardening, including a fix for a hardcoded CORS wildcard on the TTS endpoint and additional MCP server configuration protections.

entry.title: CrewAI pre-release adds Bedrock strict-mode fixes
entry.summary: CrewAI posted a new pre-release on April 14 with resume hints for devtools failure handling and a Bedrock Converse API strict-mode fix, extending its agent runtime integrations.

entry.title: n8n 2.17.0 pre-release expands AI-builder integration fixes
entry.summary: n8n published pre-release 2.17.0 on April 13 with AI-builder credential-context changes plus fixes across PostHog, NASA, Peekalink, Clearbit, and Uptime Robot integrations.

entry.title: OpenAI Agents SDK release hardens tracing and SQL session handling
entry.summary: The OpenAI Agents SDK April 9 release hardened SQLite and SQLAlchemy session handling and expanded tracing documentation, signaling continued stabilization of the production agent stack.

entry.title: Semantic Kernel refreshes prompt serialization and dependencies
entry.summary: Semantic Kernel's April 8 release included prompt-template serialization improvements and dependency updates, keeping Microsoft's orchestration SDK active as Agent Framework work continues.

entry.title: Langflow release adds Windows Playwright coverage
entry.summary: Langflow's April 7 release added Windows Playwright coverage to nightly builds and refreshed desktop documentation, indicating continued maintenance after the DataStax-to-IBM deal.

entry.title: Haystack simplifies multi-input pipelines with automatic list joining
entry.summary: Haystack's April 1 release highlighted automatic list joining inside pipelines, simplifying multi-input workflow construction without extra glue components.

entry.title: Dify 1.13.3 ships workflow and retrieval stability fixes
entry.summary: Dify v1.13.3 shipped on March 27 with workflow, streaming, and knowledge-retrieval stability fixes, reinforcing its push toward more reliable production orchestration.

entry.title: GitHub Copilot expands model-training use of interaction data
entry.summary: GitHub announced that, from April 24, interaction data from Copilot Free, Pro, and Pro+ users will be used for model improvement unless users opt out, making data-governance review more important for enterprises.

source.title: Updates to GitHub Copilot interaction data usage policy

entry.title: LlamaIndex coordinates agent-stack package updates and drops Python 3.9
entry.summary: LlamaIndex's March 16 release notes show coordinated package updates across the agent stack, including AgentMesh and Azure-related modules, alongside deprecation of Python 3.9 support.

entry.title: NeMo Guardrails adds parallel IORails safety execution
entry.summary: NeMo Guardrails' March 12 release introduced IORails for parallel input/output safety execution, plus OpenAI-compatible server support and standalone async rail validation.

entry.title: Check Point moves to acquire Lakera
entry.summary: Check Point announced an agreement to acquire Lakera, positioning the startup's AI-native protection stack inside a broader end-to-end enterprise AI security portfolio.

source.title: Check Point Acquires Lakera to Deliver End-to-End AI Security for Enterprises

entry.title: IBM announces DataStax acquisition, bringing Langflow into scope
entry.summary: IBM said it would acquire DataStax, explicitly naming Langflow as part of the transaction and tying the low-code AI builder into IBM's watsonx roadmap.

source.title: IBM to Acquire DataStax, Deepening watsonx Capabilities and Addressing Generative AI Data Needs for the Enterprise
